<?php namespace Faker\Provider\fr_CH; class Company extends \Faker\Provider\fr_FR\Company { protected static $formats = [ '{{lastName}} {{companySuffix}}', '{{lastName}} {{lastName}} {{companySuffix}}', '{{lastName}}', '{{lastName}}', ]; protected static $companySuffix = ['AG', 'Sàrl', 'SA', 'GmbH']; }
